mapper.select: SELECT cm.USER_ID AS SBMT_USER_ID, m.USER_NAME, s.SBMT_SN, s.ASGMT_SN, s.SBMT_CN, s.SCORE, s.GRDD_YN, s.GRDD_DT, s.SBMT_DT FROM CLASSROOM_MEMBER cm JOIN MEMBER m ON m.USER_ID = cm.USER_ID LEFT JOIN ASSIGNMENT_SUBMIT s ON s.ASGMT_SN = #{asgmtSn} AND s.SBMT_USER_ID = cm.USER_ID WHERE cm.CLASS_SN = #{classSn} AND cm.ENRL_STAT_CD = '01' ORDER BY cm.REG_DT ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ASSIGNMENT_SUBMIT s INNER JOIN ASSIGNMENT_BOARD ab ON ab.ASGMT_SN = s.ASGMT_SN WHERE ab.CLASS_SN = #{classSn} AND s.GRDD_YN = 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE ASSIGNMENT_SUBMIT SET SCORE = #{score}, GRDD_YN = 'Y', GRDD_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, MDFCN_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE SBMT_SN = #{sbmtSn}
